title: Furlo group
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Furlo'' group}}
'''''Furlo'' group''' consisted of three [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] that were supplying munitions to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. They were under escort from [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wings]] an the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Rahmat]]''. The Dreadnaught and the T-wings were all destroyed and the freighters were disabled and captured, despite interference from [[Zaarin coup forces|Zaarin's forces]] ranging in a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Strident]]'', which was destroyed.
